javadoc_before: /** * Rejects class names where the supplied ClassNameMatcher matches for deserialization, even if they are otherwise accepted. * * @param matcher a class name matcher to reject objects. * @return this instance. */
javadoc_after:
/**

         *
         * @param matcher the matcher to use
         * @return this instance.
